title: Import
destinationNote: Imported content is added to this workspace as new top-level pages.
shareReminder: A token does not automatically see every page. Share the top-level pages or databases you want to import with this connection in Notion first.
tokenIntroTitle: Import with a Notion API token
tokenIntroDesc: For local hosting, pasting a token you create in Notion is the most reliable setup. No OAuth app secret is needed in this app.
tokenInstructionItems: Open the Notion token page, create a personal access token or internal connection, and copy the token.
Use a current Notion API token that starts with ntn_.
Give the connection read content access. Add user-info access if you need people fields.
In Notion, open each top-level page or database, then use Share or Connections to add this connection.
connectionStorageUnavailable: 權杖僅用於此次匯入，不會儲存在此伺服器上。如需啟用已儲存的連接，請在後端設定 HANJI_NOTION_IMPORT_SECRET。
scopeWorkspaceDesc: Everything the connection can access. Database relations between pages stay intact.
scopePagesDesc: 選擇一個或多個根項目，然後遞迴匯入其可存取的子頁面、連結頁面/資料庫、關聯和檢視參照。
rootScanHint: Scans pages and data sources shared with the token or saved connection above.
rootScanEmpty: No shared top-level items were found. Share a top-level page or database with the connection in Notion, then scan again.
rootScanEmptyTitleNamed: The token works and is connected to the Notion workspace “{{workspaceName}}” — but no pages are shared with this integration yet.
rootScanEmptyTitleAnon: The token works — but no pages are shared with this integration yet.
rootScanEmptyWhy: Notion integrations can only see pages that are explicitly connected to them. Creating a token alone shows nothing.
rootScanEmptyStep1: In Notion, open the top-level page you want to import → ··· menu → Connections → add this integration.
rootScanEmptyStep2: Or open notion.so/profile/integrations → your integration → Access tab, and pick pages there.
rootScanEmptyStep3: Sharing one top-level page includes all of its subpages and databases. Then scan again here.
rootScanEmptyOtherWorkspaceNamed: If the pages live in a Notion workspace other than “{{workspaceName}}”, this token can't see them — create an integration in that workspace and use its token instead.
rootScanEmptyOtherWorkspaceAnon: If the pages live in a different Notion workspace, this token can't see them — create an integration in that workspace and use its token instead.
rootScanHasMore: Notion returned more items. If a root is missing, share only the root pages you need or use entire workspace import.
rootIdsPlaceholder: Paste Notion page links or IDs — one per line
scopeWarning: Notion API 無法存取或提供的目標可能會保留為明確標示的預留位置。
fullWidthPagesDesc: Notion doesn't expose the original Full width toggle. Keep this on to make imported non-database-row pages wide.
resumeNeedsCredential: Reconnect the saved integration or enter the original Notion token to resume this discovery.
discoveryPaused: Discovery paused before completion. Resume it to continue.
useSupportedFile: Use a Markdown, text, or CSV file.
tokenOrConnectionRequired: Enter a Notion API token or select a saved connection.
rootPagesRequired: Select at least one scanned root item, paste a page link or ID, or switch to entire workspace.
tokenMustStartWithNtn: Use a Notion API token that starts with ntn_.
oauthMissingCode: Notion connection callback was missing code or state.
expandNeedsCredential: Enter a Notion token or select a saved connection to expand discovery.
rootScanNeedsCredential: Enter a Notion API token or select a saved connection before scanning.
rootScanTimedOut: The scan stopped because the server didn't respond. Please try again.
fileRetryFinished: File copy retry finished: {{copied}} copied, {{skipped}} skipped.

wizard.needCredentialHint: Enter a Notion token or select a saved connection to continue.
wizard.needRootsHint: Select at least one root item, paste a link/ID, or use entire workspace.
wizard.runningHint: Progress updates live — you can keep this dialog open.
wizard.noJobHint: Start discovery from the Scope step first.
wizard.applyLocksHint: Applying writes the discovered items into this workspace.

installer.waitingForProgress: Waiting for the first progress update...

activity.searchComplete: Search finished — {{n}} items in the graph

hanji.title: Import from Hanji
hanji.fileHint: Export a page, database, or workspace from another Hanji, then import it here. Relations, rollups, formulas, views, and templates are preserved. Attachments are not included.
hanji.liveHint: Pull a workspace directly from another running Hanji (for example a Docker dev instance). The remote must allow requests from this address.
hanji.placeholderNote: Some attachments were left as placeholders.
hanji.importedItems_one: Imported {{count}} item from the Hanji file.
hanji.importedItems_other: Imported {{count}} items from the Hanji file.
hanji.needRemote: Enter the remote Hanji URL and workspace id.
